person.name: Mary de Moray
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography of Mary de Moravia«/b»
Mary was the daughter of Freskin de Moravia of Duffus and Strabrok and his wife Johanna. Upon her father's death sometime before 1269, she and her younger sister Christian inherited all of his properties. These included the Castle of Duffus in Moray and that barony; the barony of Strabrok in Lothian; and lands in Strathnavir and Caithness. Mary married Reginald le Chen, 3rd of Inverugie, and her sister Christian married William de Federeth.

«b»Mary de Moravia and Sir Reginald le Chen had at least four children:«/b»
1.) Sir Reginald le Cheyne, 4th of Inverugie; b. c1270; m. Helen Strathearn

2.) (daughter) le Cheyne, m. Sir Andrew Fraser of Philorth

3.) Francis (or Freskyn) le Cheyne, 1st of Straloch; b. c. 1275; m. Isabel Comyn

4.) Elena le Cheyne, b. c1280; m. Sir William Moubray

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Moray於大約1240年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾度福斯時，她的父親Freskin de Moray19歲，母親Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver19歲。她於大約1255年與Reginald le Chen在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年在蘇格蘭享年32歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McRae
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of a patronymic from the Gaelic personal name Mac Raith ‘son of grace or prosperity’. Compare McGrath , the usual Irish form of this surname.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Moray was born about 1240, in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, her father, Freskin de Moray, was 19 and her mother, Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, was 19. She married Reginald le Chen about 1255, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1271, in Scotland, at the age of 32, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Moray est née environ 1240, à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Freskin de Moray, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald le Chen environ 1255, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1271, à Écosse, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Moray um 1240 in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Freskin de Moray 19 und ihre Mutter Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver 19. Sie hat um 1255 in Scotland Reginald le Chen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Moray è nata il circa 1240 nel Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, Freskin de Moray, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Reginald le Chen circa 1255, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1271, nel Scotland, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Morayが約1240年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアダフウスで生まれた時，父Freskin de Morayは19歳，母Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaverは19歳であった。約1255年にスコットランドでReginald le Chenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年にスコットランドで32歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Moray(이)가 대략 1240년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Freskin de Moray(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 스컷랜드에서 Reginald le Chen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 스컷랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Moray nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Freskin de Moray, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald le Chen aproximadamente 1255, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1271, em Scotland, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Moray родилась около 1240 г. в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Freskin de Moray было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald le Chen около 1255 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1271 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Moray nació aproximadamente 1240, en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Freskin de Moray, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Johanna de Gunn of Strathnaver, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Reginald le Chen aproximadamente 1255, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1271, en Scotland, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
